reasoning: Arithmetic intensity is extremely low at 0.11 FLOP/byte, far below the 62 FLOP/byte ridge point, which strongly indicates bandwidth-limited behavior. DRAM bandwidth utilization is very high at 110.4% of peak, while occupancy is also high at 90.7% and register usage is modest at 20/thread, ruling out occupancy or register-pressure issues.
